heading_content_part: We collect the minimum information required to achieve thepurposes set out in this Policy (see below), and you have the ability to limitsuch collection, as specified below:(a) Registration and Account Information (e.g., name, birth date, age, phone numberand):Your name and photo (if you choose to provide them) will be youravatar. We may suggestyou as a possible contact to people we believe you may know (without revealingyour phone number), unless you turn off this option.

Your phone number might be uploaded tohttps://apivtp.vietteltelecom.vn,it’s a MyViettel domain. That means your phone number is neither published nor disclosedfor any other purpose without your consent.(b) Device and Location Information: We collect additional information when youaccess our App through a certain device (e.g. your mobile device’s uniqueidentifier; your session’s IP address; informationabout your device’s operating system; your wireless network). We may also collect

your WPS location data – you can choose whether to allow this by changing yourgeolocation tracking settings. (c) When you install the My Viettel App,you’ll also beasked to allow us access to your mobile device’s address book, or once you usesome functions in app and give us permissions, a copy of the phone numbers andnames of all your contact will be collected and stored on our servers, mainlyin order for us to be able to help you save the contacts to your new smartphone
or to only display the contact list for your reference. That means yourcontacts is neither published nor disclosed for any other purpose without yourconsent.

Disclosure:Your data is kept safe with us, but we do share your personal information withthird parties we trust in order to provide you with our services, as follows:(a) Advertising partners: to enable the limited advertisements on our service,we may share a unique advertising identifier that is not attributable to you,with our third party advertising partners, and advertising service providers,along with certain technical data about you (your language preference, country,

city, age, and device data), based on our legitimate interest. This includespartners managing our advertising placements and also advertisers themselvesand their agencies or third parties managing their advertising demands. Yourunique advertising identifier is created by your mobile device’s operatingsystem and you can change it or choose not to share it at any time.(b) App Providers and Other Third-Parties (such as third-party app analytics

providers and marketing service tool): We may disclose your information toservice providers and other third-parties under contract who help withproviding you and others our Services on our behalf or other services providedby third-parties via our Services (such as, but not limited to, retention,crash logs, product interaction). They are required to secure the data theyreceive and to use the data for pre-agreed purposes only.

Updates to this PolicyFrom time to time, as our services evolve, we may update this Policy. You agreethat we may notify you about material changes in the way we treat personalinformation by placing a notice on the App. Please check the App frequently forupdates.
Contact UsIf you still have questions about our privacy policy, please feel free tocontact us on 198 (free) or send us an email to cskh@viettel.com.vn, or usingthe contact us form on the App.
